title: schoenus ciliatus
intro: Schoenus ciliatus, also known as the hair-tufted sedge, is a type of perennial plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and cough-suppressant properties. Schoenus ciliatus is commonly prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
